en.atmosphere: Hakone hot-spring resort town, mountain tourism hub. Quiet, 200m elevation. Early last trains (22:52).
en.landmarks: Hakone Tozan Railway, hot-spring lodges, hiking trails. Alpine vibe.
en.food: 52 venues total, mostly (44). Onsen-town ryokan dining.

ja.atmosphere: 箱根温泉地。標高208m。観光地。早い電車。

ja.food: 食堂52軒。多い。温泉宿の食事中心。
ja.nightlife: ほぼなし。観光地のリズム。

ru.atmosphere: Курортный город Хаконе, 208м, туризм, рано закрывается (22:52).
